name: oblivinx3x
description: Oblivinx3x — High-Performance Embedded Document Database. Hybrid B+/LSM engine with MVCC, ACID transactions, and MongoDB-compatible query language. Zero configuration, single-file, in-process.

scripts.build:rust: cargo build --release -p ovn-neon && node -e "const{cpSync,existsSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');const src='../../target/release/ovn_neon.dll';const dst='./native/ovn_neon.node';if(!existsSync('./native')) mkdirSync('./native');if(existsSync(src)){cpSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied ovn_neon.dll -> native/ovn_neon.node (release)')}"
scripts.build:rust:debug: cargo build -p ovn-neon && node -e "const{cpSync,existsSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');const src='../../target/debug/ovn_neon.dll';const dst='./native/ovn_neon.node';if(!existsSync('./native')) mkdirSync('./native');if(existsSync(src)){cpSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied ovn_neon.dll -> native/ovn_neon.node (debug)')}"

author: Natz
